reviews.name: places/ChIJdc4v9B__rlQRTZrvcdCoPGQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201T1NIaEZhMHRvV0hSWFRWZGxiek5tUVdWYU5IYxAB
reviews.text: I am a big fan of FMI! I came FMI in 2021 to solve questions around inflammation. 5 years in, I have a functional primary care doctor (Amy Ray) who has been able to guide my supplement needs, changing reproductive health needs and new diagnosis’. The whole team meets me where I’m at. Their intake at each appointment focuses on mental health needs to ensure individual wellness. Pricing is so reasonable for what I get in return. Please make the time to make the switch. You won’t regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdc4v9B__rlQRTZrvcdCoPGQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCc1JYcGtWRFJuUlVOMldHOTBXak5pZWpOSFRXYxAB
reviews.text:
Functional Medicine of Idaho really helped me when I began seeing them 7 years ago. Karen Callagy was absolutely phenomenal, and I will always be grateful for her help, as well as the help of her former assistant, Emily.
As FMI grew and expanded, however, the quality of care they provided began to go downhill. It felt less like they truly cared, and more like I was just another way to make a profit. I grew increasingly frustrated with Karen’s assistant, Laura, who was dismissive and had difficulty communicating effectively. After a negative blood draw experience in their Boise office and miscommunication between their staff members, which caused a great deal of frustration and inconvenience for me, I finally decided to cut ties with FMI.
Unfortunately, I can no longer recommend them, but I do remain grateful for the ways they did help me on my health journey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdc4v9B__rlQRTZrvcdCoPGQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWdlVWTmZjVWRFZEhacGJWQm9SVEo0Y2xWdWNYYxAB

reviews.text: Where do I even start?! For me, this has been life changing! Entering the age of perimenopause was beyond frustrating and very disruptive with my lifestyle. I first started with Dr Mindy about a 1 1/2 years ago... I felt heard for the first time on what my body was doing. I now am in the best physical and mental state in my mid 40s! reviews.name: places/ChIJbwbJ7ZNXrlQRHIS7IWqz76s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OVWFIaG9RVk0zYlRkRk5sWmlPSEphWHpaM2RHYxAB
reviews.text:
I wanted to express my sincere gratitude for the incredible journey I've had with Harmony Healthspan over the past year. When I first started, I was constantly exhausted, felt unwell, and was struggling with depression; I simply didn't feel like myself anymore.

My initial meeting with Dr Mindy was incredibly reassuring, and she instilled confidence that she would help me find "me" again. The entire staff has been consistently sweet, supportive, and attentive throughout my time here.

This investment in my health has been truly life-changing, and it's one I will never regret. Placing my faith and trust in this clinic has been transformative, so much so that I've since referred my best friend, her husband, my mother, and several other friends.

Discovering that I had hypothyroidism and low progesterone and making the necessary adjustments has allowed me to rediscover myself. Thank you, Dr. Mindy, for giving me back to me.

reviews.text: Today I had one of the best experiences I’ve ever had with my personal health care thanks to the people working at vessel health care. Bridget at the front desk was super kind and welcoming. She answered all my questions throughly and professionally. The nurse that took my blood and did my scans was super skilled and efficient at her job. Which made it painless and not stressful in the least. The labs were completed on site for immediate results. Meaning that I could get my optimization plan started that day. Dr. Derek Vanderburg is outstanding at his job and clearly loves it. He explained the results of my labs Thoroughly and Clearly. He listened to all my  questions and answered them With some of the best knowledge I’ve came across in this kind of healthcare. You can tell just by looking at him that he practices what he preaches and has made this a lifestyle not just his job. If you want to invest in your Health and well-being. This is a place to do it. Thank you to all the vessel employees for helping me get started on my health plan to becoming the best optimized version of myself.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0eAu7uj5rlQRCXON8RvwGD4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21zMVpYaHVSbkY2YkhreFlpMXRVWGM0YkZCek1YYxAB
reviews.text:
Denette J.
The Vessel One program was exactly what I needed. Fly in, get picked up, enjoy amazing accommodations, and then spend an entire day at Vessel with my husband (actually two days—he had a stem cell PRP treatment the next day for his neck and hip, which was incredible and deserves its own review).

We went through more than 40 pages of blood work, brain health assessments, and a complete body scan—including bone density, muscle mass, and more. Then came the most important part: having a plan. I spent 90 minutes with my provider reviewing everything and starting my personalized optimization program.

I waited to write this until I could truly feel the results, and just a couple of weeks later I can honestly say I’ve noticed improvements in almost everything—joint inflammation, energy, libido—you name it. Vessel is the real deal.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0eAu7uj5rlQRCXON8RvwGD4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaalNHeE1aVzVDU1hObFlWaHhRbDk0T0RkNWNGRRAB
reviews.text:
Vessel is easily one of the best-kept secrets in Boise—until now. My wife and I came in for a couples IV session, hit the massage chairs, and ended up hanging out longer than planned (as always), just talking with Dave and Edina. They’re not only incredibly knowledgeable, they make you feel like family. We seriously lose track of time every time we’re there.

I’ve done the IV therapy, DEXA scan, and full testosterone/blood panel testing—and let me tell you, this isn’t your average “throw some vitamins in a bag” clinic. Everything is customized to your body, backed by lab work, and explained in a way that actually makes sense. I left with a full breakdown of my health and a real strategy to improve it.

Whether you’re an athlete, entrepreneur, or just someone who wants to feel your best—Vessel is where you go to get optimized. It’s not just about recovery—it’s about leveling up. 5 stars, every time.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0eAu7uj5rlQRCXON8RvwGD4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25nNFZXWnBNVzFCYkVwU1JIWlBVak5HY1RWSlJsRRAB
reviews.text:
I have nothing but great things to say about the team at Vessel Men’s Health in Boise. The staff is not only incredibly knowledgeable but also genuinely kind and welcoming. The clinic itself feels more like an Apple Store than a typical doctor’s office — clean, modern, and thoughtfully designed.

What really sets Vessel apart is the level of value and care they deliver. I previously visited a men’s clinic in Meridian that was fine, but Vessel takes the entire experience to a whole new level. From the professionalism to the personal attention, it truly feels like White Glove, VIP-level care.

If I could give 10 stars, I would. Thank you, Vessel!
— Justin Evans

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0eAu7uj5rlQRCXON8RvwGD4/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VNVDlxZC1fdTk2aDNBRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about the team at Vessel Men’s Health in Boise. From start to finish, the experience was top-tier. I came in for a DEXA scan, and not only was the process smooth and professional, but the follow-up consultation blew me away. They didn’t just throw numbers at me—they broke everything down in a way that made sense and delivered a comprehensive evaluation of where I was deficient and exactly what steps to take to get to peak physical health.
The staff is incredible—knowledgeable, welcoming, and genuinely invested in helping you perform at your best. You can feel that the ethos of the company is built around long-term health optimization, not quick fixes.

-Rob Fox

reviews.name: places/ChIJXYQW-FbHYVMRtmsrbK0onZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CaldreG1NRnBQYmxOMVkyeHllbkF0VDJFeFQwRRAB
reviews.text:
I had a very disappointing experience with Gameday Men’s Health testosterone replacement therapy program. Communication was extremely poor from the start. It was difficult to get clear answers, follow-ups were inconsistent, and I often felt left in the dark about important details regarding my treatment.

What frustrated me most were the recurring fees that were never clearly disclosed during my in-person visit. The pricing structure was not transparent, and I only realized the ongoing charges after the fact. That lack of upfront honesty left me feeling misled.

I even gave them the opportunity to make things right and address my concerns, but they neglected to follow through or take meaningful steps to resolve the situation. That was especially disappointing because it showed a lack of accountability and customer care.

Overall, the experience felt more like a pill mill than a legitimate men’s health clinic focused on individualized care. The process seemed rushed and transactional rather than thorough and patient-centered. I expected professional medical guidance and transparency, but unfortunately, that was not my experience. I would not recommend their services based on what I experienced.

reviews.name: places/ChIJjRgKdxfBYVMRxncyfGLiy0w/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJNGFIeWFREAE
reviews.text: This review is for Nutritionist Karin Michalk.  I met Karin about 7 months ago, at another location, and followed her to Functional Medicine of North Idaho.  Karin is like a ray of sunshine on a cloudy day and her knowledge and insight is IMPRESSIVE.  2 years ago I was hospitalized with kidney stones, ecoli and Sepsis.  Kootenai hospital treated me with a very powerful antibiotic.  After my treatment was over I discovered that I had contracted C Diff from my hospital roommate and I was prescribed another 2 antiobiotics to rid the C Diff.  It took me 7 months to heal myself from C Diff with the help from C Diff survivors on a FB support group.  (Oddly, most MD Drs don't have much guidance for this illness)   Although I felt better, I did NOT feel well.  I met Karin and she methodologically sorted out ALL of the problems I was experiencing:    glucose, diet, insomnia, gut issues.  If you're considering taking the the Genova gut biome test,  I  highly recommend it.  It is a bit pricey but simply Karen explained the rsults to me and I NEVER would have known that 4 crucial gut biome strains were either dead or inactive due to all of the antibiotics i was on 2 years ago.  Karin told me what to eat to try to nurture them back to life and it must've worked because my gut feels so much better.  Karin is soft spoken, intelligent, thoughtful and truly knows nutrition.  I'm beyond grateful to have met Karin.   Thank you, Karin!!!!!  You're the BEST.

reviews.text: I have been seeing Nikole Tabaracci for over a year and Karin Michalk for the last few months. They are both absolutely wonderful and I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJjRgKdxfBYVMRxncyfGLiy0w/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VKcUp1THZkbGJEWklBEAE
reviews.text: Save yourself the time and energy and just go somewhere else. I called and attempted to set up an appointment and was referred to set everything up online. My first interaction was rather poor, I didn't get a warm welcome nor was any kind of confidence instilled they would be in the future, more of a snotty/stop bothering me attitude.  I then moved on from that experience and set up the online part and then scheduled an appointment via the online portal I was referred to. I then drove an hour each way to arrive for my appointment and was then informed new patients can't schedule online. They claimed to have called and left me a voice mail "From their call log" but this is 100% inaccurate and I am unable to schedule the appointment. So far my entire experience with Function Medicine of North Idaho has been very poor.

reviews.name: places/ChIJjRgKdxfBYVMRxncyfGLiy0w/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwc09qSUhBEAE
reviews.text: I love FMNI-the nurses and admin are kind and responsive.  And I love working with Jessie. She is dedicated to her patients, and very thorough and thoughtful in her care.  I've worked with several other functional medicine providers over the years, and have stayed with Jessie because she balances the best of conventional medicine, with functional medicine -she is realistic about supplements and testing, and sensitive to cost and time.  I have experienced great healing and physical relief as a result of my work with Jessie- I have more energy, my digestive issues have basically resolved, and we are working to bring balance to those pesky hormones. I just wish I had started this process sooner!

reviews.name: places/ChIJjRgKdxfBYVMRxncyfGLiy0w/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMHZDQTFRRRAB
reviews.text: I love coming here! Friendly front office staff, friendly And caring doctors. From the moment I called and  inquired, I made a friendship. Sheryl cares, and wants to see everyone feeling the best and to their max potential! From the first appointment I went to, Arrian gave me her undivided all in listening attention. Each visit she remembers what we discussed last time, genuinely cares about my overall health, physically and mentally, and wants to see me on the best path for success. Functional medicine has gone above and beyond to search for the underlying issues. Small baby steps, but all their work is thorough, more than any doctors  office has done. All to help me find the best functioning, healthy thyroid! I refer anyone who is looking for a doctor to go to Functional Medicine of North Idaho!

reviews.text:

I have also done stem cell therapy and  the results have been great.

My husband has also had stem cell therapy on his back here as well and has experienced amazing results.  He is now going in for stem cell in his knees.

reviews.text:
I can say without hesitation that Linnae Frisby quite literally saved my life! I have been a patient of hers for over a year and met with her in November to review my routine lab work. She noticed that my hemoglobin was low and, trusting her intuition and experience, she communicated her concern and recommended a colonoscopy-just to be safe.

During the colonoscopy, a 3 cm neuroendocrine tumor was discovered on my appendix. What's even more incredible is that when I later had a CT scan to check for spread, the scan didn't even pick up the tumor at all! Since it was caught quickly, only surgery is required; no chemo is necessary.

This entire experience feels nothing short of a miracle, and I attribute it to Linnae's intuition, attention, insight, and genuine care for her patients.  If you are looking for someone who is gifted at reading lab results, even when they're "normal," and someone who is vigilant and compassionate, you couldn't get a better practitioner than Linnae.

reviews.text: I feel really betrayed by this company. I spent thousands of dollars on proprietary "hormonal supplements" that worked great for about a year for my menopausal symptoms,  and then they stopped working. The supplements are not your typical hormone replacement therapy options that are scientifically proven, nor are the ingredients published. I did not know that real menopausal hormones were even available until I started getting real hormone replacement therapy from my general practitioner. I can get everything I need for under $50 per month compared to the hundreds of dollars per month that I spent on supplements with Hormones + Weight loss. If you are struggling with all the symptoms of premenopause like belly fat, hot flashes, lack of sleep, etc. don't come here. Go to your primary physician and ask them for estrogen and/or progesterone, and start taking magnesium, D3, and fish oil. There are several doctors online that specialize in perimenopause and menopause and can help you more. I wish I had not wasted a whole year of going to this company when I could have made better health choices for myself if I had only known more earlier.

reviews.text:
This place doesn't care about you. Its all about maximizing the absolute max profit and dont care about the satisfaction of the people they sell there service to. They actually charge you more for not having insurance. They are not here for the people. I went throught there process first initial app was fine the doc was kind and informative. App 1. Then they have me come in for a second before procedure same doc absolute no point. He just asked me if I had any questions which I didn't the video they had me watch in the first app that they could have emailed me for free pretty much cover it. Charged again for second visit. The day of the procedure I find out that it's a completely different doc very unpersonal. After procedure they have me do a follow up visit with NOT the doc that did my procedure.  I expression  that I'm not satisfied he says wait a year. Then they try to schedule another visit this time with the actual doc that did the job and charge me again. So I said no thank you I've already paid for 1 and this would make 2 unnecessary visits.

Year goes by I call and ask who do I speak to if I'm not happy with the job there company did. The lady was rude and acted irritated that I even had a issue very unprofessional. She just kept trying to book me with another doc and charge me to visit. I said thats not right. She referred me to a supervisor. Who called the next day who was kind and seemed willing to find a awnsir for me.  I explained the issue. She calls me back the next day doing the same, trying to book me with yet another doc and charge me again. Just to go over what I'm not happy about. I told her I think that's ridiculous I've already paid thousands for there services that im not happy with. Why would I pay again just to have a conversation about a service I already paid for. Also whats to follow if it was a mistake by one of there surgeons? She didn't know how much it would cost for the visit. Weird, or pretty much nothing beyond the scope of book and CHARGE more $. I was pretty blown away how little they cared for a customers experience. At the end of the call she didn't know how much it would cost for this visit or what would come after if there needed to be another procedure and just told me she would call me back with that info. Which SHE NEVER DID THEY COMPLETELY BLEW ME OFF!! that was a week ago!

So to sum it up very impersonal, unprofessional, only cares about getting the max amount of money from you with visit after unneeded visit, higher prices if you don't have insurance. Terrible customer service. They don't stand behind there own product or care about your experience or satisfaction of there clients. Won't even call you back if you have a problem. How is this place still in business?

Don't come here, go to a place that actually cares about YOU. That cares about there work and your experience. As well as treats you like human and not another ticket in the line. Feels like there sole mission is to line there pockets with as much of your hard earned $ as possible and then kick you to the curb if it doesnt make them more $. I will find out who my doc was and post it here so you know to avoid. Companies like these need to go. They lost track of whos serving who, remember who pays there bills and to value there customers.

reviews.name: places/ChIJm2t3o6xWrlQRQyV_uzs-F4s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toelowbE1RMFZOUmkwM2Nua3lkVlpWVlZaVVZuYxAB
reviews.text:
Not impressed with this place when it comes to cleanliness.  Now you expect a certain amount of stuff at a urology center but the stains, spots, and puddles everywhere of urine are a bit much!  I understand they have these patents come in and accidents happen but the same stains and spots are still there months later.   It smells and honestly, I feel like I don't want to touch anything due to the contamination factor here.

The staff is hit or miss on rudeness.   They have a couple of check-in kiosks where you can type in your name but they don't think about the fact that a lot of people are touching these with no cleaning so they are probably covered in germs.  I tried to check in at the counter but was told to go back over there and use it anyway.  If they are so out of touch that they need this set up for checking in, I think this place will further go downhill.

We (my mom and I) were sent back down stairs once to get a procedure and the Dr. down there was rude while the staff did not fully explain things to us.  I could tell the staff does not like this place.  It shows and I think they need an overhaul.

The last appt we had we were left in the room for over 30minutes.   They never checked in on us.  When I came out to ask, they seemed bewildered I was asking.  Turns out, they forgot but did not admit it.  Said they switched us to see someone else sometime prior to me coming out of the room and asking.  They then just grabbed a couple of people to help us.  Never did see the actual Dr.

If you are contemplating this place, run!  There are much better facilities in this town that actually cater to the patients.  After all, they are what keeps you open for business.  The Urology Clinic on Vanguard is one.

reviews.name: places/ChIJK2Ub58r5rlQRaAVBr19CaO4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214dWRXVlVPV3BrVEdwbU5YcENSV3BLVGpnNFNVRRAB
reviews.text:
This is going to be a pretty detailed review. I feel it’s super important to mention this in case anybody else is reading this and is in the same situation I’ve been through.  Started my TRT journey in March of this year.  My primary healthcare provider put me on TRT because my levels were at a 260 when I started.  I had a horrible life.  Zero Libito,  memory issues,  i had zero drive, zero energy,   Extreme anger outbursts over stupid shit with no voice of reason to bring me off those anger ledges, and the scariest symptom was not feeling emotionally connected to my friends of family at all.  I could be in a room with my family and felt like I was a shell of a man and not present emotionally or spiritually at all!!  My primary was only able to get my levels up to 350 in 2 months.   No offense but I don’t think it was their specialty as my results weren’t great.  I went to another clinic,   I’m not mentioning names (A.M.H.)    and they were my go to provider for 3 months and at first it was a relief because they accepted my insurance, however I’m a firm believer that any provider of TRT that is insurance based is not the most amazing option,  Just saying!    Not an amazing experience AT ALL!   They were able to get my levels up to 1100 in 4 weeks however   A roller coaster ride to say the least.    From the gate I was put on estogen blockers and they continued to increase them every 4 weeks.   They also put me on HCG.    It just honestly felt like a shit show.  I believe they ment well, but I felt inside that they weren’t the answer.      I just honestly felt like I was taking stuff they recommended and I didn’t need it.
Found Sparta when I was looking for a possible other option.   I spoke with Ben several times on the phone, and he basically confirmed everything else I was researching  online about how I was not on the right path.   From the first meeting Ben & Jen’s energy was extremely welcoming!   He sat down and explained everything in a direct, professional, respectful, humble, no B.S. way.   They are EXTREMELY passionate about their desire to help!
He kicked me off my blocker  and HCG.  I was nervous because it seems like these places make you believe estrogen is the hormone boogieman.  he had me start micro dosing my injections and in the first week: freaking game changer!!!  I feel absolutely amazing and feel extremely blessed to have found these guys!   I know it’s only been a week, but it’s a testament to the knowledge Sparta has as far as I’m concerned!   For the VERY first time in months I feel stable, happy, and see some light at the end of this tunnel!  Ben, Jen:  thank you from the bottom of my heart and soul,  I’m so grateful!    Thank you thank you  thank you!!!

reviews.text:
Patient be warned. I would not recommend St Luke’s for routine health care.
I was a patient at St Luke’s men’s health for 2 visits.  My first visit was the initial new patient check in where I required high blood pressure medication and a tetanus shot. The follow up was a month later follow up.
Another month goes by and I received a bill for over $1000… I’m on tricare and the copay is $32 and all vaccines are free.
So I call tricare and find out St Luke’s coded the visit as a hospital visit because I was in an annex of the hospital. Therefore since it wasn’t an emergency I had to pay half of the visit fees.  St Luke’s refused to change the code.
After consulting a lawyer we decided it was cheaper to pay the $1000 and never utilize St Luke’s again.

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 10/10 Highly Recommend!

The team at The Regenerative and Joint Clinic + Aesthetics is absolutely incredible. The staff is helpful, attentive, and truly listens to your wants and needs. They always keep you in mind, and if you ever have questions or concerns, you can speak directly with the doctors — which is rare and refreshing.

reviews.text: My husband and I have had the best experience so far with this wonderful family making such an amazing difference! We both have experienced amazing results. And my energy and focus is coming back!!! I really enjoy the conversation I have with the staff. It’s genuine and they listen to your health needs and concerns and come at it with a more preventive aspect. I would highly recommend them❤️

reviews.text:
I cannot thank Becky, Eric, and their incredible team enough for the exceptional care I’ve received. After my hysterectomy, I was struggling with menopause symptoms—emotional rollercoasters, sleepless nights, body aches, and frustrating weight gain. Becky took the time to thoroughly review my lab results with me, providing a level of attention and compassion I hadn’t experienced in years. Her genuine care and commitment to helping me feel better made all the difference. Since starting HRT, I’ve noticed significant improvements in many areas of my life.
Though menopausal weight gain remained a challenge despite my efforts with diet and exercise, meeting with Eric was a game-changer. His wealth of knowledge, friendly demeanor, and practical nutritional guidance were incredibly engaging. He provided tailored advice and valuable resources that empowered me to make positive changes.
The entire staff at the clinic deserves recognition for their kindness and professionalism. Every interaction has been a pleasure, and I’m so grateful for this team’s top-notch care in helping me feel like myself again. Highly recommend!

reviews.text:
I cannot say enough positive things about The Regenerative and Joint Clinic and Aesthetics. From the very first visit, I felt truly heard. The team is incredibly personable and takes the time to listen carefully to your concerns rather than rushing you through an appointment.
What really sets them apart is their willingness to push the boundaries of traditional healthcare to find real solutions. As a woman navigating perimenopause/menopause, I felt especially supported. They understand the unique challenges women face during this stage of life and work diligently to create personalized treatment plans.
They thoughtfully combine supplements and prescriptions, working closely with you to find the right balance—not just so you feel “okay,” but so you achieve optimal health. It’s clear their goal isn’t just symptom management, but helping you truly feel your best.
They also make themselves available for questions and concerns and are excellent at responding and communicating. You genuinely feel important as a patient and know they are committed to your well-being.
I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a provider who listens, cares, and is dedicated to helping you thrive.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about this wellness center! The feel good program has been a game changer for my energy levels, sleep schedule and my ability to stay focused.  The staff is incredibly knowledgeable — they don’t just give you an answer, they take the time to explain things in a way I can understand. Any time I have a question, I get a prompt and thorough response, which makes me feel truly supported in my health journey.

The clinic is spotless and well-organized, and it’s always easy to get my supplies when I need them. They take the time to educate which has been a huge help to understanding the process. Communication here is top-notch, and every staff member I’ve interacted with has been both friendly and professional. It’s clear they care about their patients and are committed to making the process as smooth and stress-free as possible.
Highly recommend!!!
